title: SDD Layer Alignment
description: Consolidate AI commands from 16 to 11 by removing redundant commands, renaming for clarity, and converting audit to a skill. Stream 1 of 3-stream alignment effort.

title: US1: Delete Redundant Commands
description: Remove 6 redundant AI commands: resume, help, adopt, add-deps, remove-deps, revise

title: US2: Rename Analyze to Verify
description: Rename specledger.analyze.md to specledger.verify.md for OpenSpec terminology alignment

title: US3: Convert Audit to Skill
description: Convert specledger.audit.md command to skills/sl-audit/skill.md skill

title: US4: Update Implement
description: Update specledger.implement.md to absorb resume functionality

title: US5: Update Onboard
description: Update specledger.onboard.md to absorb help functionality

title: US6: Update Clarify
description: Update specledger.clarify.md to absorb revise functionality and use sl comment

title: Delete specledger.resume.md
description: WHY: Resume is a duplicate of implement - both handle task execution
design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.resume.md. Delete the file. Functionality will be merged into implement.md in US4.
acceptance_criteria: File deleted. ls shows 14 remaining command files.

title: Delete specledger.help.md
description: WHY: Help is absorbed by onboard - onboarding is the natural place for command discovery
design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.help.md. Delete the file. Functionality will be merged into onboard.md in US5.
acceptance_criteria: File deleted. ls shows 13 remaining command files.

title: Delete specledger.adopt.md
description: WHY: Adopt is replaced by ContextDetector fallback chain - no AI command needed
design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.adopt.md. Delete the file. Context detection in internal/ref/ handles this now.
acceptance_criteria: File deleted. ls shows 12 remaining command files.

title: Delete specledger.add-deps.md and remove-deps.md
description: WHY: Dependency management is handled by sl deps CLI - agent calls it directly
design: Files: .claude/commands/specledger.add-deps.md, .claude/commands/specledger.remove-deps.md. Delete both files. Agent uses sl deps add/remove directly.
acceptance_criteria: Both files deleted. ls shows 10 remaining command files.

title: Delete specledger.revise.md
description: WHY: Revise is absorbed by clarify - comment processing belongs with spec refinement
design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.revise.md. Delete the file. Functionality will be merged into clarify.md in US6.
acceptance_criteria: File deleted. ls shows 9 remaining command files (before rename/convert).

title: Rename analyze.md to verify.md
description: WHY: OpenSpec terminology alignment - verify is clearer than analyze for artifact validation
design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.analyze.md. Rename to .claude/commands/specledger.verify.md using git mv.
acceptance_criteria: File renamed. specledger.verify.md exists, specledger.analyze.md does not.

title: Update verify.md description
description: WHY: Users familiar with analyze need to know verify is the successor
design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.verify.md. Update frontmatter description to note 'successor to analyze (OpenSpec terminology)'.
acceptance_criteria: Description mentions successor to analyze. OpenSpec terminology noted.

title: Create sl-audit skill
description: WHY: Codebase reconnaissance is passive context, not workflow orchestration - belongs in L3 not L2
design: File: pkg/embedded/templates/specledger/.claude/skills/sl-audit/skill.md. Create skill with: Overview, When to Load, Key Concepts, Decision Patterns, CLI Reference. Reference sl-issue-tracking skill as model.
acceptance_criteria: Skill exists at correct path. Follows skill template structure. Provides audit patterns.

title: Delete specledger.audit.md
description: WHY: Audit command is converted to skill - no longer needed as AI command
design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.audit.md. Delete the file after skill is created.
acceptance_criteria: File deleted. Final command count is 11.

title: Add resume logic to implement
description: WHY: Resume is a duplicate of implement - consolidate by adding resume detection to implement
design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.implement.md. Add section after git pull: Check sl issue list --status in_progress for current spec. If found, prompt to resume or start fresh. Continue from last checkpoint if resuming.
acceptance_criteria: Implement checks for in-progress tasks. Prompts to resume if found. Continues from checkpoint.

title: Add command overview to onboard
description: WHY: Help is absorbed by onboard - add command overview section for discoverability
design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.onboard.md. Add Command Overview section after workflow intro: List core workflow commands (specify, clarify, plan, tasks, implement) with one-line descriptions. List utility commands (constitution, checklist, verify).
acceptance_criteria: Command Overview section exists. Lists all core commands. Lists utility commands. Each has description.

title: Add comment processing to clarify
description: WHY: Revise is absorbed by clarify - add comment processing for spec refinement
design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.clarify.md. Add comment processing section after ambiguity scan: Fetch open comments via sl comment list --status open --json. Process each comment. Reply via sl comment reply. Resolve via sl comment resolve. Replace sl revise --summary with sl comment list.
acceptance_criteria: Clarify fetches open comments. Processes each comment. Replies and resolves. Uses sl comment instead of sl revise --summary.
